name: lineup_adjusted_k_rate_feature_upgrade
mechanism: Replace team-level K rate in V1 feature set with lineup-weighted K rate. Lineup-level strikeout composition better represents true offensive suppression than team averages.
direction: improvement in validation AUC and UNDER hit rate

name: lineup_contact_x_pitcher_whiff_interaction
mechanism: Pitcher whiff rate (sp_k_pct proxy) multiplied by opposing lineup contact rate (1 minus whiff%). Low-contact lineup facing high-whiff pitcher produces amplified suppression signal.
direction: improvement in validation AUC and UNDER hit rate
